pr.title: Non-record: Depth Recurrence 4x3 + SwiGLU + Int6 Quant + Sliding Window, val_bpb=1.2269 (4xH100)

output.summary: Reuses four transformer blocks across three passes with SwiGLU and int6 middle-layer quant to pack 12-layer compute plus sliding-window eval under 16MB.
techniques: 4-block×3 recurrence to boost depth without extra params
SwiGLU FFNs with int6 quantized middle blocks for compression
sliding-window scoring to give every token near-full context
